headline: Promotion-friendly campaign entry links and handoff bar.
notes: Adds campaign-aware entry links so promo traffic can open city, sample, or route starts with clearer handoff.
Planner now keeps a fresh latest route session and offers resume or use-as-base actions on return.
Release-check can reset latest route session state and now reports it alongside draft status.
Planner release tooling also fixes missing planner-draft reset handlers in release-check.
